name: Greg Gianforte
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican |
body:
We fell short, but made a big impact in Montana's future. I'm writing to thank you for your support in our race for governor of Montana this year. | | |
---|---|---
| [](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38751776:sQMyXcuN6:m:1:1369946915:CD75A58C991773E70782D49F30480A4A:r) |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| Friend,

I'm writing to thank you for your support in our race for governor of Montana this year.

With your help we ran an incredibly strong campaign, going up against a well-funded career politician. And while the final election outcome was a disappointment, I know we've made a huge impact to change the political conversation in Montana. |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| I knew taking on an incumbent would be a challenge, but I decided to run for office because I believe in the potential of Montana and in all Montanans. Nothing has changed that for me.

Even though we did not prevail, you have my commitment that I will continue to work to create better outcomes for all Montanans. Our fight for accountability in state government, sensible regulation reform and better jobs and opportunities for Montanans is far from over.

Again, thank you for EVERYTHING you did to support me in this race. It's hard to express how much I appreciate every vote, every volunteer hour and every donation. Your faith in our fight has meant the world to me.

Together, we'll keep working every day for a better Montana.

Sincerely,

Greg and Lesley |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| [](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38751777:sQMyXcuN6:m:1:1369946915:CD75A58C991773E70782D49F30480A4A:r)[](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38751778:sQMyXcuN6:m:1:1369946915:CD75A58C991773E70782D49F30480A4A:r) |
| |
---|---|---
| Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican |
| |
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system July 8, 2016.

name: Christine Harbin
subject: More welfare for major corporations?
body:
| | [Web Version](http://view.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=a229822a2df718598fa8a32b0f1c36793464657fdb3ccb3ca1d0b1f44a984a0915deb645b26b37f1ce45e8cabc1a5abd49e1f241a5f8708907f00b97ef270091165ce54f3eef0ee6)
---
| |
---
| | | | |
---
| |
---
| | Peter-

At the top of the list for lawmakers during this lame duck session of Congress -- which takes place after new lawmakers are elected but while the old ones are still in office -- is a whole lot of corporate welfare.

You see, while these dozens of lawmakers are voted out, they feel that they are no longer accountable to the people. They see it as their chance to extend their tax giveaways to their friends in big business.

**It's just not fair for taxpayers to bear the burden of politically-connected private businesses.** Dozens of corporate and individual tax breaks are set to expire at the end of the year, and it's gone on long enough.

These include some of the most odious forms of corporate welfare today, which explains why President Obama and Sen. Reid want to pass them as part of end-of-year, "must-pass" legislation before the next administration comes in.

Totaling billions, these tax giveaways include:

* ****Tax credits for maintaining private railroad tracks. Cost to taxpayers: $428 million

****
* ****Tax credits for NASCAR and Hollywood movie studios. Cost to taxpayers: $26 million

****
* ****Subsidies for rum producers. Cost to taxpayers: $336 million

****
* ****Renewable energy subsidies. Cost to taxpayers: at least $7 billion

****
* ****And more!**

**

Allowing this corporate welfare to end would save taxpayers BILLIONS, and keep Congress from continuing to play favorites with our tax dollars.

[](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=e377463bd9c9a9c3b81ef411e02aed105755c14cd9c4416105510e5e6cf1d478f1b53ca3c74c1135) [](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=e377463bd9c9a9c3b81ef411e02aed105755c14cd9c4416105510e5e6cf1d478f1b53ca3c74c1135)

Don't let your lawmaker cave in to lobbyists' demands -- [tell them to let the tax extenders expire](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=e377463bd9c9a9c3ef27a740d87d36b1671461fdfca9202d553a191beef45ac6468f8ca78753de9b "tell them to let the tax extenders expire")!

It's past time that our country move away from systematic corporate welfare.

For Freedom,

Chrissy Harbin
Director of Federal Affairs and Strategic Initiatives, AFP

---

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com **
We respect your right to privacy - [view our policy](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=e377463bd9c9a9c3a32b71beb8deebe4398811b727d44d8d53818e84be7014bd23537f81f18a783e) Americans For Prosperity Foundation 1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700 Arlington, VA 22201 ******[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c7
54b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=
003i00000262AbVAAU) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c7
54b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=
003i00000262AbVAAU)******

name: Trey Nix, RoyCooper.com
subject: re: the facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Governor McCrory and his campaign are attempting to undermine the results of this election. We aren't going to let it happen, but we need your help. Can you chip in today to help us confirm Roy's win?
Governor McCrory and his campaign are attempting to undermine the results of this election. We aren't going to let it happen, but we need your help. Can you chip in today to help us confirm Roy's win?
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202ace/2fde7c66/43b6314d/1569340d/3039829340/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-protectthiswin?utm_campaign=fnd_protec_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161114_fnd_gq_protec_ful__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friends, Last Tuesday, North Carolinians chose a new governor. After four years of partisan politics that divided the state, Roy Cooper was elected to lead us into the future. Now, Governor McCrory and his campaign are attempting to undermine the results of this election. **We aren't going to let it happen. We have hired a team of lawyers to help us protect this win, but we need your help. Can you chip in today to help us confirm Roy's win?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202ace/2fde7c66/43b6314d/1569340c/3039829340/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-protectthiswin?utm_campaign=fnd_protec_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161114_fnd_gq_protec_ful__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [**$50 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202ace/2fde7c66/43b6314d/1569340f/3039829340/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dZWE5yTWlCOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-protectthiswin?utm_campaign=fnd_protec_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161114_fnd_gq_protec_ful__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| [**$100 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202ace/2fde7c66/43b6314d/1569340e/3039829340/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dZWE5yTXlCOWZRPT0iOiIxMDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-protectthiswin?utm_campaign=fnd_protec_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161114_fnd_gq_protec_ful__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=100")

| | [**Other »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202ace/2fde7c66/43b6314d/1569340d/3039829340/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-protectthiswin?utm_campaign=fnd_protec_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161114_fnd_gq_protec_ful__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Here's the latest, Friends. The McCrory campaign is using an NCGOP lawyer to attack the Republican appointed board of elections in Durham County.
Governor McCrory appointees were the ones who administered the election and reported the results.
We are confident that once the results are certified, they will confirm Roy's victory. The McCrory team's complaints are nothing more than a desperate attempt to overturn results of an election they have lost.
Those are the facts.
**[We are going to do whatever it takes to protect this win. Chip in here to help out.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202ace/2fde7c66/43b6314d/1569340d/3039829340/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-protectthiswin?utm_campaign=fnd_protec_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161114_fnd_gq_protec_ful__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
Thanks for your support,
Trey Nix
Campaign Manager
Cooper for North Carolina
| [**Chip in ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202ace/2fde7c66/43b6314d/1569340d/3039829340/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-protectthiswin?utm_campaign=fnd_protec_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161114_fnd_gq_protec_ful__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
